zh.Bergheim, Rijnland, Preußen, Duitsland: 海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 波海姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Kleve於1308年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 波海姆時，她的父親Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath21歲，母親Machteld Yolanda van Voorne12歲。她於大約1330年與Gottfried von Jülich結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫霍德可拉倫格被列為äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara 。她去世於1361年3月21日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫多特蒙德霍德可拉倫格享年53歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫多特蒙德霍德可拉倫格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Kleve于1308年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 波海姆时，她的父亲Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath21岁，母亲Machteld Yolanda van Voorne12岁。她于大约1330年与Gottfried von Jülich结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫霍德可拉倫格被列为äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara 。她去世于1361年3月21日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫多特蒙德霍德可拉倫格享年53岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫多特蒙德霍德可拉倫格。

en.Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, North Rhine: Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Kleve was born in 1308, in Bergheim, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath, was 21 and her mother, Machteld Yolanda van Voorne, was 12. She married Gottfried von Jülich about 1330. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. Her occupation is listed as äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara  in Clarenberg, Hörde, Westphalia, Prussia. She died on 21 March 1361, in Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 53, and was buried in Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Kleve est née en 1308, à Kreis Bergheim, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Machteld Yolanda van Voorne, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Gottfried von Jülich environ 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. La profession de sa indiquée est äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara  à Clarenberg, Hörde, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse. Elle est décédée le 21 mars 1361, à Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Kleve 1308 in Kreis Bergheim, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath 21 und ihre Mutter Machteld Yolanda van Voorne 12. Sie hat um 1330 Gottfried von Jülich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. ihr Beruf ist als äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara  in Clarenberg, Hörde, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen aufgeführt. Sie starb am 21. März 1361 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Kleve è nata il nel 1308 nel Kreis Bergheim, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, sua padre, Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Machteld Yolanda van Voorne, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Gottfried von Jülich circa 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara  nel Clarenberg, Hörde, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen. Morì il 21 marzo 1361, nel Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Kleveが1308年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレイス バーグヘイムで生まれた時，父Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrathは21歳，母Machteld Yolanda van Voorneは12歳であった。約1330年にGottfried von Jülichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。プレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンhoルドクラーエンバーグでの職業はäbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara と記録されている。彼女は1361年3月21日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンドールトムンドhoルドクラーエンバーグで53歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンドールトムンドhoルドクラーエンバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Kleve(이)가 1308년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레이스 버게이임에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Machteld Yolanda van Voorne(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 대략 1330년 Gottfried von Jülich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀의 직업은 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 ho르드 클래런버그에서 äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara 이었다. 그녀는 1361년 3월 21일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 도르트먼드 ho르드 클래런버그에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 도르트먼드 ho르드 클래런버그에 묻혔다.

pt.Hoorn, Noord-Holland, Nederland: Hoorn, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Kleve nasceu em 1308, em Kreis Bergheim, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Machteld Yolanda van Voorne, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Gottfried von Jülich aproximadamente 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara  em Clarenberg, Hörde, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen. Ela faleceu em 21 de março de 1361, em Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Kleve родилась в 1308 г. в местности крис биргим, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Machteld Yolanda van Voorne, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gottfried von Jülich около 1330 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.  Она работала по профессии äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara  в местности кларенбирг, хoрд, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия. Она умерла 21 марта 1361 г. в местности кларенбирг, хoрд, дортмунд, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности кларенбирг, хoрд, дортмунд, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Kleve nació en 1308, en Kreis Bergheim, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Dietrich Luf III. von Kleve-Hülchrath, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Machteld Yolanda van Voorne, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Gottfried von Jülich aproximadamente 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era äbtissin des klarissen-kloster st. clara  en Clarenberg, Hörde, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1361, en Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Clarenberg, Hörde, Dortmund, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
